title: Coastal Teal Multi-Line Seersucker Wide-Leg Trousers
description: Bring a fresh, contemporary vibe to your wardrobe with this Coastal Teal Multi-Line Seersucker Wide-Leg Trousers. Crafted for comfort and style, these trousers feature a relaxed wide-leg silhouette with a fluid drape that moves effortlessly. The vibrant coastal teal base is accentuated with subtle multi-line detailing, adding a modern, dynamic touch to the design.
